name: @ai-sdk/open-responses
description: The **[Open Responses provider](https://ai-sdk.dev/providers/ai-sdk-providers/open-responses)** for the [AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) contains language model support for [Open Responses](https://www.openresponses.org/) compatible APIs.
